style_guide: Painted kid-friendly spy adventure, secret nature garden, clear season clues, readable objects, no text inside generated images.

assets.prompt: A cheerful Seasons Garden background with spring blossoms, summer flowers, a modest poem board, small spring leaf clue, small winter snow card clue, windy autumn path leaves, and a clear garden gate embedded naturally in the painted scene; no readable text, no floating props, no oversized clue objects.
Transparent-background prop atlas for Seasons Garden: poem board, spring leaf, summer flower, winter snow card, windy fall marker, and garden gate; no readable text.

assets.decision: Reuse the established Agent Alex spritesheet for campaign continuity.
Reuse the established Agent Alex portrait sheet.
Reuse the polished existing guide spritesheet until a dedicated Gardener Mira sheet can match the same quality and walk-cycle constraints.

integration_note: Level 09 now uses an embedded-prop Seasons Garden background for the world objects. The transparent prop atlas remains referenced only for inventory reward icons; scene hotspots and the garden gate are represented by painted background art.
